name: my-harness-generator
description: Generic project harness generator. /my-harness-init walks you through a structured interview, produces spec markdowns, and bootstraps the project end-to-end. Supports Hono + Cloudflare D1 + Resend + Playwright + Maestro, with 4-lane parallel development, TDD enforcement, Codex integration, secret masking, and git discipline.

plugins.name: my-harness
plugins.description: Harness generator core. 21 skills (entry point + conventions + shell wrappers) + 5 agents (4-lane parallel coordination) + 2 hooks (auto-logged conversations).
